heading: Authority to establish procedures to consider the separation of officers for substandard performance of duty and for certain other reasons
label: 20501 Authority to establish procedures to consider the separation of officers for substandard performance of duty and for certain other reasons

children.heading: Procedures for Review of Record of Officers Relating to Standards of Performance of Duty.—
children.label: a Procedures for Review of Record of Officers Relating to Standards of Performance of Duty.—

children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force shall prescribe, by regulation, procedures for the review at any time of the record of any commissioned officer (other than a retired officer) of the Space Force in a space force active status to determine whether the officer shall be required, because of a reason stated in paragraph (2), to show cause for the officer’s retention in a space force active status.

children.label: A
children.text: The officer’s performance of duty has fallen below standards prescribed by the Secretary of Defense.

children.label: B
children.text: The officer has failed to satisfy the standards and qualifications established under by the Secretary of the Air Force.section 20403 of this title

children.heading: Procedures for Review of Record of Officers Relating to Certain Other Reasons.—
children.label: b Procedures for Review of Record of Officers Relating to Certain Other Reasons.—

children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force shall prescribe, by regulation, procedures for the review at any time of the record of any commissioned officer (other than a retired officer) of the Space Force in a space force active status to determine whether the officer should be required, because of a reason stated in paragraph (2), to show cause for the officer’s retention in a space force active status.

children.label: C
children.text: The officer’s retention is not clearly consistent with the interests of national security.

children.heading: .—Secretary of Defense Limitations
children.label: c .—Secretary of Defense Limitations
children.text: Regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Air Force under this section are subject to such limitations as the Secretary of Defense may prescribe.
